mapper.select: select i.item_seq AS itemSeq, i.store_seq AS storeSeq, st.user_seq AS userSeq, u.user_id AS partnerId, st.company_name AS partnerName, i.category_seq AS categorySeq, i.item_code AS itemCode, i.item_name AS itemName, i.spec AS spec, i.unit_price AS unitPrice, i.item_image AS itemImage, ca.category_name AS categoryName from items i join stores st on i.store_seq = st.store_seq join users u on st.user_seq = u.user_seq left join categories ca on i.category_seq = ca.category_seq where u.user_type = 'PARTNER' and u.status = 'ACTIVE' order by st.company_name, i.item_seq

select s.stock_seq AS stockSeq, s.store_seq AS storeSeq, s.stock_name AS stock, s.current_stock AS quantity, s.safety_stock AS safetyStock from stocks s where s.store_seq = #{storeSeq} and ( replace(s.stock_name, ' ', '') like concat('%', replace(#{itemName}, ' ', ''), '%') or replace(#{itemName}, ' ', '') like concat('%', replace(s.stock_name, ' ', ''), '%') or s.stock_name regexp replace(#{itemName}, ' ', '|') )
SELECT s.company_name AS companyName, s.zonecode AS zoneCode, s.address1 AS address1, s.address2 AS address2 FROM stores s WHERE s.store_seq = #{value}
mapper.insert: insert into orders (order_no, zonecode, address1, address2, order_memo, buyer_seq, seller_seq, total_amount, status, created_at) values (#{orderNo}, #{zonecode}, #{address1}, #{address2}, #{orderMemo}, #{buyerSeq}, #{sellerSeq}, #{totalAmount},'REQUESTED', NOW())
mapper.select: select distinct st.store_seq AS storeSeq, i.user_seq AS userSeq, u.user_id AS partnerId, st.company_name AS partnerName from items i join users u on i.user_seq = u.user_seq join stores st on u.user_seq = st.user_seq order by st.company_name
mapper.insert: insert into order_items (order_seq, item_seq, item_name, category_name, quantity, spec, unit_price, total_price) values (#{orderSeq}, #{itemSeq}, #{itemName}, #{categoryName}, #{quantity}, #{spec}, #{unitPrice}, #{totalPrice})
mapper.select: SELECT o.order_seq AS orderSeq, o.order_no AS orderNo, o.status AS status, o.created_at AS createdAt, o.total_amount AS totalAmount, o.order_memo AS orderMemo, o.zonecode, o.address1, o.address2, st.company_name AS companyName FROM orders o JOIN stores st ON o.seller_seq = st.store_seq WHERE o.order_seq = #{orderSeq}

SELECT order_item_seq AS orderItemSeq, item_name AS itemName, category_name AS categoryName, quantity, spec, unit_price AS unitPrice, total_price AS totalPrice FROM order_items WHERE order_seq = #{orderSeq}

SELECT o.order_seq AS orderSeq, o.order_no AS orderNo, partner_store.store_seq AS partnerSeq, partner_store.company_name AS partnerName, o.total_amount AS totalAmount, DATE_FORMAT(o.created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') AS createdAt, CONCAT( COALESCE(MIN(oi.item_name), '발주 품목'), CASE WHEN COUNT(oi.order_item_seq) > 1 THEN CONCAT(' 외 ', COUNT(oi.order_item_seq) - 1, '건') ELSE '' END ) AS title FROM orders o JOIN stores buyer_store ON buyer_store.user_seq = o.buyer_seq JOIN stores partner_store ON partner_store.user_seq = o.seller_seq LEFT JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_seq = oi.order_seq WHERE buyer_store.store_seq = #{storeSeq} AND partner_store.store_seq = #{partnerSeq} AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM payment_order_map pom JOIN payments p ON pom.payment_seq = p.payment_seq WHERE pom.order_seq = o.order_seq AND p.status = 'PAID' ) GROUP BY o.order_seq, o.order_no, partner_store.store_seq, partner_store.company_name, o.total_amount, o.created_at ORDER BY o.order_seq DESC
